name: forward-roll
description: A personal, jj-first Codex workflow plugin for specs, epics, and bounded development slices.

interface.shortDescription: Bootstrap, specify, plan epics, and execute bounded slices.
interface.longDescription: Forward Roll is a lightweight Codex plugin for personal development workflows. It keeps specs, epics, slices, feedback, and jj-native execution aligned without imposing a heavy project framework.
defaultPrompt: Bootstrap Forward Roll for this repo.
Specify the project at a high level.
Plan the next epic and bounded slice.
